About_&_Key_Points:
About
Incorporated in 2004, Krishana Phoschem Ltd is in the business of manufacturing fertilisers & chemicals.
[1]
It manufactures and markets fertilisers under the brands
‘Annadata’
(SSP) and
‘Bharat’
(NPK/DAP complex).
[2]
Key Points
Business Overview:
[1]
Krishana Phoschem Ltd. (KPL), part of the Ostwal Group, is an integrated phosphatic fertiliser manufacturer engaged in the production of DAP/NPK fertilisers, SSP, sulphuric acid, phosphoric acid, and beneficiation of low-grade rock phosphate.  Through its
Annadata
and
Bharat
brands, KPL offers crop nutrition solutions. . Its backward-integrated operations across the phosphatic fertiliser value chain support raw material security, operational efficiency, and margin stability.
